# ai corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === OpenAI ===
# expect: OpenAI Service Account Key
sk-svcacct-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: OpenAI Admin API Key
sk-admin-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: OpenAI User Key (no project)
sk-None-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: OpenAI Project API Key
sk-proj-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: OpenAI Organization ID
org-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === Anthropic ===
# expect: Anthropic API Key
sk-ant-api03-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: Anthropic Admin API Key
sk-ant-admin01-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === Hosted model APIs ===
# expect: Groq API Key
gsk_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: Replicate API Token
r8_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: HuggingFace User Access Token
hf_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: HuggingFace Organization API Token
api_org_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: OpenRouter API Key
sk-or-v1-aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
# expect: Perplexity API Key
pplx-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: Fireworks AI API Key
fw_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: Anyscale Endpoints API Key
esecret_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === LangChain stack ===
# expect: LangSmith API Key
ls__aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
# expect: LangChain API Key
lsv2_pt_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: Helicone API Key
sk-helicone-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
# expect: LlamaIndex Cloud Key
llx-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === Speech ===
# expect: Deepgram API Key
dg_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

# === OpenAI API Key (T3BlbkFJ + classic 48) ===
# expect: OpenAI API Key
sk-proj-aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaT3BlbkFJbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb
sk-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUV

# === OpenAI Realtime / Firecrawl / LangSmith / Pinecone / ElevenLabs (Block 3a) ===
# expect: OpenAI Realtime Ephemeral Key
# expect: Firecrawl API Key
# expect: LangSmith API Key
# expect: Pinecone API Key
# expect: ElevenLabs API Key
ek_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
fc-aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
lsv2_pt_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa_aaaaaaaaaa
